/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Hyble
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {



    inline static const std::array<int32_t, 4> entries = {
        1, 1, 2, 3
    };

    inline static const std::array<uint16_t, 1> displacements = {
        0
    };

    static constexpr uint64_t get_hash(const int32_t value) noexcept {
        return static_cast<uint64_t>(value);
    }

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const int32_t key) noexcept {

        const uint64_t hash = get_hash(key) * 5871781006564002453ULL;
        const uint32_t approx = static_cast<uint32_t>(static_cast<__uint128_t>(hash) * 4ULL >> 64);
        const size_t bucket = hash & 0ULL;
        const size_t index = approx + displacements[bucket];
        const auto& entry = entries[index];

        return key == entry;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 3;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key = 1;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key = 3;
};
